---
name: Design/UI change
about: Request layout, styling, visual, or interaction changes
title: "[Design] "
labels: design
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

What visual or interaction change is needed?

## Page or area affected

Link, route, component, or section name.

## Current design

Describe what exists now. Attach screenshots if helpful.

## Desired design

Describe what should change.

## Design references

Add Figma links, screenshots, brand guidance, examples, or related issues.

## Responsive considerations

Anything specific for mobile, tablet, or desktop?

## Definition of done

- [ ] UI change is implemented
- [ ] Matches approved design/reference
- [ ] Reviewed on desktop
- [ ] Reviewed on mobile
- [ ] No obvious layout or text overflow issues
